meaning: n.[化]一种化学原料(为杀虫剂及合成染料)
examples: Xanthone was reduced to xanthydrol by sodium borohydride.
In the present paper, a series of xanthene-2-carboxylic acids and xanthone-2-carboxylic acids with electron withdrawing groups on the 7-position had been synthesized.
That whiff of science was good enough to get XanGo (the name blends "xanthone" and "mangosteen") under way.
